case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA VS. ALEKSANDR PASKO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED FEB-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PASKO, ALEKSANDR
